CheckTitle: Detect service principals with credentials but no recent sign-in
Description: Identifies service principals that have active credentials (secrets or certificates) but show no sign-in activity, suggesting they may be stale or abandoned.
Risk: Service principals with valid credentials that are not actively used represent dormant attack vectors. If their credentials are compromised, the breach may go undetected for a long time.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review stale service principals. Remove credentials from SPs that are no longer needed, or disable them entirely.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports. This check works best with P2 license which provides SP sign-in logs via beta API.
